basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-IARI is recruiting 01 Senior Project Associate for the DBT-funded NCS-TCP project. Candidates with Masters or Doctoral degree in Biotechnology/Virology/Plant Pathology with relevant experience can apply.

age_limit.age_details: Temporary and co-terminus with the project

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job responsibilities: Molecular diagnostics, virome analysis, database management, and project-related activities in NCS-TCP
qualification.education_qualification: Masters degree in Biotechnology/Virology/Plant Pathology or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology + Four years experience in Research and Development OR Doctoral degree in relevant field

selection_process: Selection will be based on Walk-in-Interview on 28 July 2026 at 09:30 AM. Candidates should bring complete bio-data in the prescribed format along with original documents. Advance applications can be sent by email.
how_to_apply: Step 1: Send duly filled application in the prescribed format along with scanned documents and CV (single merged PDF) through email to [email protected] latest by 25 July 2026.
Step 2: Appear for the Walk-in-Interview on 28 July 2026 at 09:30 AM at the Division of Plant Pathology, ICAR-IARI, New Delhi with complete bio-data and original documents.
Venue: Division of Plant Pathology, ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute, New Delhi - 110012.
important_instructions: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. The institution reserves the right to modify the number of vacancies. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Candidates should bring all original documents for verification.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: ICAR-IARI invites applications for engagement of Senior Project Associate on a contractual basis in the Division of Plant Pathology. The selected candidate will work on molecular diagnostics of viruses and virus-like agents in tissue culture raised plants under the NCS-TCP project. Download ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-IARI is recruiting 01 Senior Project Associate for the DBT-funded NCS-TCP project. Candidates with Masters or Doctoral degree in Biotechnology/Virology/Plant Pathology with relevant experience can apply.

rows.icar_indian_agricultural_research_instit: National Certification System for Tissue Culture Raised Plants (NCS-TCP)
Temporary and co-terminus with the project

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Masters degree in Biotechnology/Virology/Plant Pathology or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology + Four years experience in Research and Development OR Doctoral degree in relevant field

Research experience in molecular diagnostics of viruses and virus-like agents, hands-on expertise in PCR/RT-PCR/qPCR/DAS/DAC ELISA, virome analysis, SOPs preparation, database management, good publications in SCI journals, NET qualified
Molecular diagnostics, virome analysis, database management, and project-related activities in NCS-TCP

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Walk-in-Interview on 28 July 2026 at 09:30 AM. Candidates should bring complete bio-data in the prescribed format along with original documents. Advance applications can be sent by email.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Step 1: Send duly filled application in the prescribed format along with scanned documents and CV (single merged PDF) through email to [email protected] latest by 25 July 2026. Step 2: Appear for the Walk-in-Interview on 28 July 2026 at 09:30 AM at the Division of Plant Pathology, ICAR-IARI, New Delhi with complete bio-data and original documents. Venue: Division of Plant Pathology, ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute, New Delhi - 110012.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. The institution reserves the right to modify the number of vacancies. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Candidates should bring all original documents for verification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to send application for ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for email application is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Senior Project Associate vacancies are available at ICAR-IARI?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy (Unreserved).

faq.question: Q3. What is the emolument for Senior Project Associate at ICAR-IARI?
faq.answer: Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for ICAR-IARI SPA position?
faq.answer: Masters degree in Biotechnology/Virology/Plant Pathology + Four years experience OR Doctoral degree in relevant field.

faq.question: Q5. What is the interview date for ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate?
faq.answer: The walk-in-interview is on 28 July 2026 at 09:30 AM.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ICAR-IARI Senior Project Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Send application by email to [email protected] by 25 July 2026 and attend walk-in-interview on 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What experience is desirable for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Hands-on expertise in PCR/RT-PCR/qPCR/ELISA and molecular diagnostics of viruses.

faq.question: Q8. Is NET qualification preferred for ICAR-IARI SPA?
faq.answer: Yes, NET qualified candidates would be preferred.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Senior Project Associate position at ICAR-IARI permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is temporary and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. In which division is the Senior Project Associate post at ICAR-IARI?
faq.answer: Division of Plant Pathology.
